title: Chronic Kidney Disease Management and Pharmacotherapy
summary: This LCD provides coverage criteria for pharmacological management of chronic kidney disease (CKD) in Medicare beneficiaries, including use of agents with demonstrated nephroprotective evidence. SGLT2 inhibitors with FDA-approved renal indications (e.g., dapagliflozin for CKD, canagliflozin for diabetic nephropathy) are covered when documentation supports the diagnosis and meets clinical criteria in the indications module.
_fixture_note: Illustrative LCD. Verify against live CMS API before clinical use.
